cards.name: The Fool
cards.core_upright: A leap into the unknown with open trust. The Fool stands at the cliff with everything they need and no map. This card honors the courage of beginning before you're ready.
cards.core_reversed: The leap without the readiness. Naive optimism, ignored warnings, or freezing at the threshold. Sometimes the cliff is real and the Fool needs to look down first.
cards.context_career_upright: A new role, new venture, or new direction calling. Untested but full of potential.
cards.context_career_reversed: Acting impulsively in your work without enough preparation, or refusing to begin out of fear.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Openness to a new connection or a fresh chapter in an existing one. Beginner's mind.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Naivety about red flags or commitment to something not yet examined.
cards.context_general_upright: Trust the unknown. The path reveals itself by walking it.
cards.context_general_reversed: Slow down. Look before leaping. Recklessness will cost you.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.core_upright: You have what you need. The Magician points to the alignment of skill, will, and opportunity — the moment when intention becomes action.
cards.core_reversed: The tools are present but misused. Manipulation, self-deception, or scattering energy across too many directions.
cards.context_career_upright: You have the resources, skills, and timing to manifest a specific outcome. Move with intention.
cards.context_career_reversed: Talent without focus, or using competence in ways that drift from your real values.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Conscious creation of connection. Showing up fully, communicating clearly.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Charm used as a tool. Watch for performance over authenticity — yours or theirs.
cards.context_general_upright: Concentrate your power on one thing. The conditions are aligned.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're dispersing your energy or being dispersed by someone else's intentions.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.core_upright: The answers you're seeking are already inside, beneath conscious thought. The High Priestess asks you to listen below the noise.
cards.core_reversed: Disconnection from your own knowing — either you're ignoring intuition or following the wrong inner voice. Sometimes: a hidden thing comes to light.
cards.context_career_upright: Trust your read on the situation. Information you can't fully articulate yet is still valid.
cards.context_career_reversed: Override of intuition by external pressure, or overthinking what your gut already knows.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Sensing what isn't said. Deep, quiet attunement to another.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Something hidden is shifting — either being concealed or about to surface.
cards.context_general_upright: Be still. The answer will arrive when you stop chasing it.
cards.context_general_reversed: You know something you're refusing to let yourself know.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.core_upright: Generative force. The Empress represents what blooms when given time, care, and the right conditions. Abundance through patience.
cards.core_reversed: Generativity blocked or distorted — creative stagnation, over-giving until depleted, or expecting nurture without offering it.
cards.context_career_upright: A project or role enters a growth phase. Creative output flows.
cards.context_career_reversed: Burnout from over-giving at work, or a creative dry spell.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Nurturing, sensual, fertile connection. Care expressed in body and gesture.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Dependency or smothering; care that's become heavy.
cards.context_general_upright: Tend to what you're growing. The harvest comes from steady attention.
cards.context_general_reversed: Something has been neglected — likely yourself.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.core_upright: Stable structure built through discipline. The Emperor represents authority earned through consistency and the protection that order provides.
cards.core_reversed: Authority misused or absent. Either rigid control without flexibility, or a needed structure that hasn't been built.
cards.context_career_upright: Leadership, building systems, taking ownership. Time to organize.
cards.context_career_reversed: Power struggles, micromanagement, or chaos from lack of structure.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Reliable, grounded, protective. Commitment as architecture.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Domineering dynamic or absent leadership in the partnership.
cards.context_general_upright: Build the structure. Freedom comes from form, not its absence.
cards.context_general_reversed: Either you're controlling too much or being controlled. Both need rebalancing.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.core_upright: The wisdom held by institutions, lineages, traditions. The Hierophant points to the value of what's been transmitted across time.
cards.core_reversed: When tradition becomes constraint. Time to question inherited beliefs, or to forge your own path outside convention.
cards.context_career_upright: Conventional path, mentorship, working within an established structure.
cards.context_career_reversed: The conventional path doesn't fit — time to leave the script.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Marriage, formal commitment, shared values and traditions.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Breaking from expected relationship form. Unconventional partnership.
cards.context_general_upright: There's wisdom in the old ways here. Learn from those who came before.
cards.context_general_reversed: What was inherited no longer serves. Make your own meaning.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.core_upright: A meaningful choice, especially one that reveals or shapes your values. The Lovers is about union — not only romantic, but the merging of paths that align.
cards.core_reversed: Misalignment, a choice avoided, or a union that doesn't share foundational values.
cards.context_career_upright: A career choice that reflects who you really are. Alignment of work and meaning.
cards.context_career_reversed: Conflict between work and values; a misaligned decision pulling you off course.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Deep connection, mutual choice, partnership rooted in shared values.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Disconnection at the values level. Surface attraction without depth.
cards.context_general_upright: A choice is here that matters. Choose with your whole self.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're avoiding a choice, or the option you're considering isn't truly yours.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.core_upright: Forward motion through focused will. The Chariot represents the moment when conflicting forces are harnessed and pointed in one direction.
cards.core_reversed: The reins dropped, or held too tight. Either scattered effort or aggression masquerading as drive.
cards.context_career_upright: Push forward. Your effort is about to break through.
cards.context_career_reversed: Burnout from over-driving, or stalled momentum from internal conflict.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Working through obstacles together. Aligned forward motion.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Power struggles, opposing directions, or one person carrying all the drive.
cards.context_general_upright: You can do this. Move.
cards.context_general_reversed: Stop pushing. Something is unaligned and force won't fix it.

cards.name: Strength
cards.core_upright: Strength here is gentleness with backbone. Not the strength that conquers, but the strength that endures with grace. Power held without aggression.
cards.core_reversed: Strength used as force, or self-doubt that hides genuine capability. The lion either overwhelms or is overwhelmed.
cards.context_career_upright: Quiet, persistent capability winning over time. Calm leadership.
cards.context_career_reversed: Imposter feelings, or aggression masking insecurity.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Soft strength. Holding boundaries with love, not force.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Power dynamics off — either suppressing yourself or pushing too hard.
cards.context_general_upright: Your real strength is patience and warmth, not force.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're stronger than you think — or you're using strength when softness would serve better.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.core_upright: Withdrawal to seek answers within. The Hermit carries the lantern that lights only the next step. This is the wisdom found in solitude.
cards.core_reversed: Isolation that has tipped from healthy solitude into withdrawal. Or refusing the solitude that's needed.
cards.context_career_upright: Step back. Solo work, deep focus, or seeking a wise outside perspective.
cards.context_career_reversed: Isolated in a way that's hurting you, or refusing to do the inner work that's needed.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Needing time alone within or apart from a connection. Honor it.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Loneliness within a relationship, or hiding from connection.
cards.context_general_upright: Withdraw and listen. The lantern shows only the next step.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're hiding, or you've been alone too long and don't know it.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.core_upright: The wheel turns. What rose will fall, what fell will rise. Honor the moment of inflection.
cards.core_reversed: Resisting an inevitable turning, or stuck in a cycle that keeps repeating because something hasn't been learned.
cards.context_career_upright: A turning point — opportunity or shift outside your full control.
cards.context_career_reversed: Fighting a change that's already underway. Or repeating an old pattern.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Cyclical patterns surfacing, or a relationship at an inflection.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: The same problem recurring. The pattern is asking to be seen.
cards.context_general_upright: Something is turning. Don't try to stop the wheel.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're stuck because you're resisting the turn.

cards.name: Justice
cards.core_upright: Cause and effect made visible. Justice is the card of consequence — what you've planted is becoming what's harvested. Truth doesn't blink.
cards.core_reversed: Avoiding accountability, or being treated unfairly. Sometimes: facing a consequence you've been delaying.
cards.context_career_upright: Fair outcome based on what you've actually done. Legal, contractual, or evaluative matters resolved with clarity.
cards.context_career_reversed: Unfair treatment, or your own avoidance of responsibility catching up.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Honest reckoning. What's been true is being acknowledged.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Imbalance being denied — by you, by them, or by both.
cards.context_general_upright: What you have built is what you're now living in.
cards.context_general_reversed: Stop avoiding the conversation you need to have with yourself.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.core_upright: Inverted perspective. The Hanged Man sees what others can't because they've stopped fighting their position. Surrender as wisdom.
cards.core_reversed: Stalling disguised as patience, or sacrifice that costs more than it gives.
cards.context_career_upright: Pause your career momentum to see it differently. The path will be clearer after the wait.
cards.context_career_reversed: Stuck without growth. The 'pause' has become avoidance.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Letting go of how you wanted this to look. Seeing the connection fresh.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Martyring yourself in a connection that won't reciprocate.
cards.context_general_upright: Stop trying to move forward. The answer is in seeing it differently.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're sacrificing for something that isn't asking you to.

cards.name: Death
cards.core_upright: Necessary ending. Death clears the ground for what's next. Not loss for its own sake, but the closure that makes new growth possible.
cards.core_reversed: Refusing the ending that's needed, or dragging out a goodbye long past its time.
cards.context_career_upright: A chapter is ending. Let it. Something better cannot enter until this one closes.
cards.context_career_reversed: Holding onto a role, a project, or an identity that's already done.
cards.context_relationships_upright: An ending — of a connection, a phase, or an old pattern. Necessary, however painful.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Refusing to grieve, or trying to revive what's already gone.
cards.context_general_upright: Let it die. The new can't come until you do.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're prolonging something that's already over.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.core_upright: The art of combining opposites without losing either. Temperance is patient blending — the slow alchemy that produces something more than the sum of parts.
cards.core_reversed: Imbalance. Either too much of one thing or violent oscillation between extremes.
cards.context_career_upright: Steady, balanced progress. Combining diverse skills or perspectives effectively.
cards.context_career_reversed: Burnout from overwork, or scattered effort across too many directions.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Balanced partnership. Two distinct people blending without dissolving.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Extreme dynamic — codependence or excessive distance.
cards.context_general_upright: Take the middle path. It's not boring; it's wise.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're swinging between extremes. Slow down.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.core_upright: The chains you're wearing that aren't locked. The Devil represents the things we believe bind us but actually only require willingness to release.
cards.core_reversed: Beginning to see the chains for what they are. The first step toward freedom.
cards.context_career_upright: Trapped by money, status, or fear of leaving. The bondage is real but voluntary.
cards.context_career_reversed: Recognizing what's held you back and starting to step out.
cards.context_relationships_upright: An unhealthy attachment, addiction, or dynamic you can't seem to leave.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Naming the dynamic and beginning to break free.
cards.context_general_upright: What you think holds you isn't holding you. The lock is open.
cards.context_general_reversed: You're seeing it clearly now. Keep going.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.core_upright: Lightning strikes the false structure. The Tower comes down because it was built on illusion. Sudden, shocking, and ultimately clarifying.
cards.core_reversed: Sensing the tower is unstable but holding it up anyway. Or: collapse averted, for now.
cards.context_career_upright: A sudden shake-up — job loss, exposure, scandal, or a structural collapse that frees you.
cards.context_career_reversed: You see the cracks but you're propping it up. It will fall anyway.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Revelation that changes everything. A relationship structure breaks.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Knowing it's not working but not yet acting. The break is coming.
cards.context_general_upright: What's falling needed to fall. Let it.
cards.context_general_reversed: You can't keep holding up what's already broken.

cards.name: The Star
cards.core_upright: Quiet hope after the storm. The Star is the soft return of light — not triumphant, but patient and real. Renewal you can trust.
cards.core_reversed: Disconnection from hope. Faith feels thin or impossible.
cards.context_career_upright: Clarity returning about what you're really for. Long-view inspiration.
cards.context_career_reversed: Lost the thread of why you started. Burnout that's eroded meaning.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Tender, gentle reconnection. Hope after difficulty.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Disillusionment, or hopelessness about a connection's future.
cards.context_general_upright: Things are quieter and clearer than they were. Trust this.
cards.context_general_reversed: You've lost faith. Tend to the small things that bring you back.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.core_upright: The terrain of dreams, fears, and the not-yet-known. The Moon doesn't lie, but it doesn't show everything either. Walk slowly.
cards.core_reversed: Mist lifting. What was confused is becoming clearer; what was feared is revealed as smaller than imagined.
cards.context_career_upright: Murky situation, half-truths, or anxiety about an unclear path.
cards.context_career_reversed: Confusion clearing. The path becomes visible.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Something hidden or only partially understood. Trust your unease.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: What was unclear is now visible.
cards.context_general_upright: You don't have to see the whole path. Walk what's lit.
cards.context_general_reversed: The fog is lifting. You can move forward now.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.core_upright: Unambiguous good. The Sun is warmth, clarity, vitality — the rare card that simply says yes.
cards.core_reversed: Sunshine through clouds. The good is real but harder to feel right now.
cards.context_career_upright: Recognition, success, things finally working. Visible win.
cards.context_career_reversed: Achievement that doesn't feel like enough, or success on hold.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Joyful, clear connection. Easy warmth.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Putting on a happy face. The shine doesn't reach inside.
cards.context_general_upright: This is the good moment. Let yourself receive it.
cards.context_general_reversed: The good is there but you can't feel it. Be gentle.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.core_upright: A calling that asks you to rise. Judgement is the moment of awakening — clear-eyed reckoning with what you've been and what you're being asked to become.
cards.core_reversed: Hearing the call but doubting yourself. Or judging yourself so harshly that you can't move.
cards.context_career_upright: A calling to step into something larger. Time to answer.
cards.context_career_reversed: You hear the call and you're hesitating. Or you're punishing yourself for past missteps.
cards.context_relationships_upright: Honest reckoning with how you've shown up. A chance to begin again, clearly.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Self-blame, or refusal to acknowledge what needs acknowledging.
cards.context_general_upright: Something is calling. Rise.
cards.context_general_reversed: Stop judging yourself harshly. Listen for the call beneath the noise.

cards.name: The World
cards.core_upright: Completion. The cycle is whole; the pieces have integrated. The World is the rare card of arrival — not the end of everything, but the end of *this*.
cards.core_reversed: Almost there. Loose ends or shortcuts that prevent real completion.
cards.context_career_upright: Completion of a chapter or project. Mastery integrated.
cards.context_career_reversed: Close to done but missing something. Don't shortcut the last 10%.
cards.context_relationships_upright: A connection or chapter that feels whole, complete, fully itself.
cards.context_relationships_reversed: Almost there but not quite. Something unspoken or unfinished.
cards.context_general_upright: You've completed something real. Honor it before moving on.
cards.context_general_reversed: Finish what you started. Don't skip the ending.
